## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategies for scaling customer advocacy and marketing initiatives using automation and offshore resources.](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Explore using automation, AI workflows, and lower-cost offshore resources to scale customer advocacy efforts efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Integrate Salesforce with AirTable/AirOps to better track and manage customer engagement, advocacy activities](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Pilot a customer Slack community to facilitate advocacy activities like podcasts, case studies, reviews](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Leverage automation tools and offshore assistants to streamline repetitive customer touchpoints](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Customer Advocacy Vision

  - [Automate processes to pull customers into advocacy funnels (podcasts, case studies, reviews) based on feedback/usage](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Use offshore resources to assist with routine customer outreach, managing Slack channels](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Integrate disparate tools like Salesforce, AirTable, AirOps for centralized customer data management](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Scaling Customer Success

  - [Current challenges with manually tracking customer health, touchpoints in Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Explore alternatives like AirTable for collaboration, building custom workflows/apps](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Integrate systems to trigger automated touchpoints, health checks based on milestones](https://fathom.video/share/7n6kHwCsG1_kgEzxnFUtszD_isAXzFbf?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
